reviews.comment:
Atencion buena combustibles desde planta y no mesclados. Wifi ah pedal pero bueno el bufet ehhh bueno mas o menos baños bien camping bien al lado. Hay cola algunas veces pero es rapido.

(Translated by Google)
Good service, fuels are fresh and not mixed. The Wi-Fi is a bit slow, but the buffet is okay. The bathrooms are fine, and the campsite is right next door. There's sometimes a queue, but it moves quickly.
